title: Frame
description: A safe, filtered view of a tool execution result. Produced by the agent-kernel firewall. This is what contextweaver and the LLM see. Never contains raw tool output.

capability_id.description: The capability that produced this Frame.

summary.description: Human-readable, LLM-safe summary of the execution result. Must not contain raw tool output.

structured_data.description: Optional structured subset of the result that has been reviewed and approved for LLM consumption. Must be firewall-filtered.

handle_refs.description: List of Handle IDs referencing the full raw artifacts. Handles require authorization to resolve.

redaction_notes.description: Optional description of what was redacted or filtered from the raw output.

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when this Frame was created by the firewall.
